name: Jerry's Jewelry & Loans
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Lynnwood, WA since 1964 specializing in jewelry sales and collateral-based loans with a 96% customer satisfaction rating.
description_long:
Jerry's Jewelry & Loans Inc. has operated as a family-owned pawn shop in Lynnwood, Washington for nearly 60 years, establishing itself as a neighborhood fixture since 1964. The business operates from a single location at 19811 Highway 99 in Lynnwood and maintains an active social media presence through Facebook and Instagram, where they share product listings and engage with their community. The company has built a reputation reflected in their 96% recommendation rate based on 16 Facebook reviews, suggesting consistent customer satisfaction.

The company offers two primary services: quality jewelry sales and pawn loans secured by collateral. As a pawn shop, they extend "no hassle loans" on a variety of items beyond jewelry, though specific loan terms, interest rates, and maximum loan amounts are not detailed on their available website content. Customers can visit the physical storefront for in-person transactions, and the business advertises both in-store shopping and pickup services. Their pricing is positioned in the mid-range ($$) segment.

What distinguishes Jerry's Jewelry & Loans is their longevity and family ownership model, which suggests stability and community integration rare in the pawn industry. Their emphasis on "quality jewelry" indicates possible specialization or curation beyond typical pawn shop inventory. The strong satisfaction rating (96%) on social media suggests they may differentiate through customer service or transparent business practices.

Prospective customers should note that detailed information about loan terms, APR, repayment periods, and redemption policies is not available on their Facebook presence. As with all pawn transactions, borrowers should understand that failure to repay results in loss of collateral. The business appears to rely primarily on social media and word-of-mouth for customer engagement rather than maintaining a dedicated informational website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned business with 60+ years of operational history since 1964, suggesting stability and community trust
96% customer recommendation rate based on verified Facebook reviews
Advertises "no hassle loans," suggesting simplified application and approval processes
Accepts collateral on diverse items beyond jewelry, offering flexibility for different customer needs
Mid-range pricing ($$) positioning suggests competitive rates relative to other pawn shops
Active social media presence on Facebook and Instagram with regular customer engagement
Convenient Lynnwood location on Highway 99 with both in-store shopping and pickup options
cons: Limited publicly available information about loan terms, interest rates, and APR on Facebook page
No dedicated website beyond Facebook—difficult to research loan eligibility, repayment terms, or policies before visiting
Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside the Lynnwood area
No information provided about hours of operation, making it unclear when the business is open
Pawn model inherently risks loss of collateral if loan is not repaid, regardless of customer circumstances
best_for: Lynnwood-area residents needing quick collateral-based loans without extensive credit checks
Customers seeking to sell or trade quality jewelry or other valuable items for immediate cash
Borrowers who prefer in-person transactions and prefer to avoid online lending platforms
Individuals valuing long-standing, family-owned businesses with established community reputation
diagnosis: Jerry's Jewelry & Loans is best for Lynnwood-area residents who need quick cash through collateral-based loans or wish to buy/sell jewelry from a trusted family business. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral, which is forfeited if the loan isn't repaid, and detailed loan terms (APR, repayment period, maximum loan amounts) are not published online—requiring an in-person visit to understand specific lending conditions.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry and other collateral
Collateral-based lending on various items beyond jewelry
Social media-based customer engagement and product showcasing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
